---
title: "Álvaro Junquera"
subtitle: |
  Barcelona Supercomputing Center (BSC-CNS)
description-meta: "Álvaro Fernández Junquera is a researcher in labour economics"
image: "files/images/afj.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full
from: markdown+emoji

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: sun
      text: Lab
      href: https://www.bsc.es/discover-bsc/organisation/scientific-structure/cssh
      target: _blank
#    - icon: globe
#      text: Uprofile
#      href: https://baruch.cuny.edu
#      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:alvaro.junquera@bsc.es  
#    - icon: linkedin
#      text: LinkedIn
#      href: https://linkedin.com
#      target: _blank
#    - icon: youtube
#      text: YouTube
#      href: https://www.youtube.com     
#      target: _blank 
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0080-7608
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
#      href: https://www.webofscience.com  
#      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
#      href: https://www.scopus.com
#      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.es/citations?user=K-5DfYoAAAAJ&hl=es&oi=ao
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
#      href: https://www.researchgate.net
#      target: _blank

#listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
#  - id: recent-posts
#    contents: 
#      - posts
#      - posts/post-links.yml
#    exclude:
#      title: ""
#    type: grid
#    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
#    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
#    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
#    max-description-length: 75
#    sort: 
#      - "date desc"
#      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a postdoctoral researcher at the [Computational Social Sciences and Humanities Laboratory](https://www.bsc.es/discover-bsc/organisation/scientific-structure/cssh) of the Barcelona Supercomputing Center (BSC). I'm part of the [Welfare and Equity](https://www.bsc.es/research-development/research-areas/social-simulation/welfare-and-equity) team, led by Prof. Caterina Calsamiglia.

I am interested in labour markets, public policy, and methods. My research is focused on the application of causal inference and machine learning to the analysis of labour market policies and industrial policies. I have taught data analysis courses using `R`.

## News

- 05/02/26: Our project "AI4SOCIAL+: AI Readiness for Social Impact" has been selected for [funding]([https://ec.europa.eu/info/funding-tenders/opportunities/portal/screen/opportunities/calls-for-proposals?order=DESC&pageNumber=1&pageSize=50&sortBy=startDate&isExactMatch=true&status=31094501,31094502,31094503&callIdentifier=HORIZON-INFRA-2025-01]) from the European Commission (€7.4 M). I will work on Use Case 1 (AI for Job Trajectories).
- 07/11/25: Talk at the IV Workshop on International Trends in Economic Research ([UGR](https://tehieco.ugr.es/en)) to present "More money, more effects?".
- 05/11/25: Our project "Strategies for Human capital Advancement and Productive Employment" (SHAPE) has been awarded [funding](https://www.aei.gob.es/en/announcements/announcements-finder/proyectos-generacion-conocimiento-2024) from the Ministry of Science, Innovation and Universities (Government of Spain).
- 28/10/25: The policy report on effective ALMP for people with mental disorders (written with D. Gallardo & D. Saeteros) has been [published](https://ivalua.cat/sites/default/files/2025-10/Revsi%C3%B3%20Evid%C3%A8ncia%20Pol%C3%ADtiques%20d%27ocupaci%C3%B3%20Salut%20mental%20Def_0.pdf).

:::
